Cao Qi śõĻŚēü
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Qi (śõĻŚēü). Older son of Prince Cao Lin, older brother of Cao Mao. Cao Qi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
